recommendations.title: Only the Brave
recommendations.overview: Members of the Granite Mountain Hotshots battle deadly wildfires to save an Arizona town.

recommendations.title: Top Gun: Maverick

recommendations.title: F1
recommendations.overview: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

recommendations.title: TRON: Legacy
recommendations.overview: Sam Flynn, the tech-savvy and daring son of Kevin Flynn, investigates his father's disappearance and is pulled into The Grid. With the help of a mysterious program named Quorra, Sam quests to stop evil dictator Clu from crossing into the real world.

recommendations.title: Oblivion

recommendations.title: Equilibrium
recommendations.overview: In a dystopian future, a totalitarian regime maintains peace by subduing the populace with a drug, and displays of emotion are punishable by death. A man in charge of enforcing the law rises to overthrow the system.

recommendations.title: Electric Dreams

recommendations.title: The Big Fake
recommendations.overview: Toni Chichiarelli arrives in Rome with the dream of becoming a painter, but his talent leads him elsewhere — from art galleries to state secrets. Between art, crime, and power, his signature ends up everywhere — even in the history of Italy.

recommendations.title: Them!

recommendations.title: The Consequences of Love
